name: Veg Stir Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 - 2 cups broccoli (florets and stems, cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok until it coats all surfaces without making veggies slimy (about 1/2 - 2/3 cup).
2. Add scallions and garlic, cooking until garlic turns brown.
3. Add pea pods, squash, and broccoli; cook for 3-5 minutes.
4. Stir in bean sprouts, water chestnuts, bamboo shoots, and red bell pepper; cook until slightly tender but still crisp.
5. Add pineapple chunks, mandarin orange slices, and mango; cook for about a minute.
6. Pour in the sauce mixture; continue cooking until it starts bubbling.
7. Serve over rice. Enjoy!
